_comment: Fixture users for SimDrive recording/replay. Ship in the dev-build app bundle (NOT the App Store build) and seed into the recording-backend database via docker-compose.recording.yml. Fixed UUIDs keep replay diffs stable across machines and across re-records. See ../safety-checklist.md before touching.
_warning: DO NOT reuse these UUIDs or emails in any environment that touches production data. Anyone reading this file gets the full fixture set — treat them as published.

users.notes: Default fixture user — basic member, no permissions, no real data attached. Most journeys should target this user.
Admin role — use only for recordings of admin-only journeys (user management, billing, etc.).
Fresh-account flavor — onboarding incomplete, no data, no preferences. Use for first-run / empty-state journeys.

_replay_note: If you add a user, give it a deterministic UUID (sequential 1...1, 2...2 is fine) and a deterministic createdAt. Random UUIDs / live timestamps cause SSIM diffs on any screen that renders user.id or 'joined X ago'.
